description: '''Lu√≠s Filipe Fraga Oliveira''' ({{IPA|pt-PT|luňąi É f…®ňąlip…® ňąf…ĺa…£…ź …Ēliňąv…źj…ĺ…ź}}; born 27 May 1983), better known by his stage name '''Lucenzo''' ({{IPA|pt|luňąsŠļĹzu|pron}}), is a Portuguese-French [[reggaeton]] singer, songwriter, rapper and record producer.
